nodes.description: Number of initiated+emerged lateral roots per unit primary-root length

LR-inhibiting hormone, antagonistic to auxin

LR-inhibiting via MAX2/D14
Shoot-demand N limitation; induces CLE peptides
P-starvation; promotes LR density via TIR1 and STOP1-ALMT1 (latter abstracted)

Aux/IAA repressor of LR founder-cell specification
LR-initiation TF, redundant with ARF19
LR-initiation TF, redundant with ARF7

AP2/ERF TF for LR primordium morphogenesis

Auxin influx carrier - uptake into pericycle/emerging primordium
Auxin influx carrier induced in endodermis/cortex during LR emergence
IPA biosynthesis step (Trp to IPA); rate-limiting for local IAA production
TAA1 paralog; N- and ethylene-induced auxin biosynthesis

edges.mechanism: TAA1 aminotransferase converts Trp to IPA in IAA biosynthesis pathway

evidence.title: The main auxin biosynthesis pathway in Arabidopsis
evidence.evidence_sentence: Trp is converted to IPA by TAA1/TARs, and then IPA is converted to IAA by the flavin monooxygenases (YUCCAs)
evidence.claim: TAA1 produces IPA for auxin biosynthesis

edges.mechanism: TAR2 aminotransferase contributes to IAA biosynthesis under low N

evidence.title: TAR2 in low-nitrogen reprogramming of root architecture
evidence.evidence_sentence: Low NO3- restored auxin accumulation in primordial of LRs via TAR2

edges.mechanism: YUC4 flavin monooxygenase converts IPA to IAA

evidence.title: Auxin in Root Development
evidence.evidence_sentence: First step in LR initiation involves formation of auxin maximum dependent on influx carrier AUX1 and activation of YUCCA4-mediated auxin biosynthesis
evidence.claim: YUC4 produces auxin for LR initiation

edges.mechanism: AUX1 auxin influx carrier facilitates shoot-derived IAA loading into vasculature

evidence.title: Auxin in Root Development
evidence.evidence_sentence: AUX1 facilitates loading of shoot-derived IAA into vascular system

edges.mechanism: GH3 acyl amidosynthetases conjugate IAA to amino acids (inactive)

evidence.title: Auxin in Root Development
evidence.evidence_sentence: higher levels of auxin led to expression of conjugating enzyme GH3

edges.mechanism: DAO1 dioxygenase oxidizes IAA to inactive oxIAA

evidence.title: Auxin in Root Development
evidence.evidence_sentence: AtDAO1 oxidize endogenous auxin

edges.mechanism: Low N stimulates TAR2 auxin biosynthesis gene

evidence.title: Nitrate Signaling and RSA
evidence.evidence_sentence: TAR2 is stimulated under low-nitrogen conditions

edges.mechanism: NRT1.1 represses TAR2 auxin biosynthesis gene

evidence.title: Auxin-Regulated LR Organogenesis
evidence.authors: Cavallari N, Artner C, Benkova E
evidence.evidence_sentence: NRT1 controls auxin biosynthesis by repressing expression of TAR2

edges.mechanism: Auxin binds TIR1/AFB F-box co-receptor to form SCF complex with Aux/IAA substrate

evidence.title: Genetic analysis of the Arabidopsis TIR1/AFB auxin receptors reveals both overlapping and specialized functions
evidence.evidence_sentence: auxins are perceived by co-receptor complex consisting of TIR1/AFB... Formation leads to degradation of Aux/IAA protein

edges.mechanism: Low Pi upregulates TIR1 to increase auxin sensitivity

evidence.title: Auxin in Root Development
evidence.evidence_sentence: Phosphate deficiency due to signaling pathway enhancing sensitivity to auxin via up-regulation of TIR1 auxin receptor

edges.mechanism: SCF-TIR1 ubiquitinates IAA14 for 26S proteasomal degradation in presence of auxin

evidence.title: Auxin in Root Development
evidence.journal: Cold Spring Harbor Perspectives in Biology
evidence.evidence_sentence: The auxin signal captured by TIR1/AFBs accelerates the degradation of Aux/IAA proteins such as IAA14/SLR

edges.mechanism: SCF-TIR1 degradation of IAA28

evidence.title: Auxin in Root Development
evidence.journal: Cold Spring Harbor Perspectives in Biology
evidence.evidence_sentence: TIR1/AFBs accelerates the degradation of Aux/IAA proteins such as IAA14/SLR, IAA3/SHY2, IAA19/MSG2, and IAA28

edges.mechanism: IAA14 physically binds ARF7 via PB1 domain to repress its transcriptional activity

evidence.title: Auxin-Regulated Lateral Root Organogenesis
evidence.authors: Cavallari N, Artner C, Benkova E
evidence.journal: Cold Spring Harbor Perspectives in Biology
evidence.evidence_sentence: auxin-regulated signaling modules...IAA14-ARF7-LBD16

edges.mechanism: IAA14 physically binds ARF19 to repress its activity

evidence.title: Interplay of Auxin and Cytokinin in Lateral Root Development
evidence.evidence_sentence: SLR/IAA14-ARF7 and ARF19 in cortex and epidermis regulate pathways enabling separation

edges.mechanism: IAA28 represses ARF6/7/8/19 in basal meristem for founder cell specification

evidence.title: Auxin in Root Development
evidence.evidence_sentence: GATA23 activated at specific pre-branch sites through IAA28-ARF 6/7/8/19-dependent pathway
evidence.claim: IAA28 represses ARF7 in founder cells

edges.mechanism: IAA28 represses ARF19 activity in basal meristem

evidence.title: Auxin in Root Development
evidence.evidence_sentence: IAA28-ARF 6/7/8/19-dependent pathway

edges.mechanism: ARF7 directly binds LBD16 promoter to activate transcription as primary auxin response [Edge represents composite family; evidence drawn from curated E018 (ARF7->LBD16).]

evidence.title: ARF7 and ARF19 Regulate LR Formation via Direct Activation of LBD/ASL Genes
evidence.evidence_sentence: recombinant GST-ARF7 protein, but not GST alone, bound to the single LBD16 promoter

edges.mechanism: ARF19 binds LBD16 promoter (minor contribution vs ARF7) [Edge represents composite family; evidence drawn from curated E021 (ARF19->LBD16).]

evidence.title: ARF7/ARF19 direct activation of LBD/ASL
evidence.evidence_sentence: ARF19 directly regulates both genes, but LBD16 less so

edges.mechanism: ARF7 activates PLT3 in incipient LR primordia [Edge represents composite family; evidence drawn from curated E034 (ARF7->PLT3).]

evidence.title: PLETHORA orchestrate de novo organ patterning
evidence.evidence_sentence: upstream auxin response factors ARF7 and ARF19 required to activate expression of early PLT genes

edges.mechanism: ARF19 redundantly activates PLT3 with ARF7 [Edge represents composite family; evidence drawn from curated E037 (ARF19->PLT3).]

evidence.title: PLETHORA orchestrate de novo organ patterning
evidence.evidence_sentence: ARF7 and ARF19 required to activate expression of early PLT genes

edges.mechanism: LBD16 upregulates PUCHI in newly developed LRPs [Edge represents composite family; evidence drawn from curated E026 (LBD16->PUCHI).]

evidence.title: Auxin in Root Development
evidence.evidence_sentence: LBD16 in turn up-regulates PUCHI, auxin-inducible transcription factor expressed within newly developed LRPs

edges.mechanism: LBD29 directly activates LAX3 auxin influx carrier for cell separation [Edge represents composite family; evidence drawn from curated E027 (LBD29->LAX3).]

evidence.title: Auxin in Root Development
evidence.evidence_sentence: LAX3 is downstream target of LBD29, which is direct target of ARF7

edges.mechanism: PLT controls PIN1 expression and polar membrane localization in primordia [Edge represents composite family; evidence drawn from curated E041 (PLT3->PIN1).]

evidence.title: PLETHORA orchestrate organ patterning
evidence.evidence_sentence: from stage II onward, polar localization on plasma membrane of PIN1 impaired in mutant

edges.mechanism: LBD16 required for asymmetric division initiating LR primordium [Edge represents composite family; evidence drawn from curated E029 (LBD16->Lateral_Root_Density).]

evidence.title: ARF7/ARF19 regulate LBD/ASL
evidence.evidence_sentence: overexpression of LBD16 and LBD29 induced lateral root formation in the absence of ARF7 and ARF19

edges.mechanism: PLT3 required for LR primordium outgrowth and proper spacing; loss causes clustering [Edge represents composite family; evidence drawn from curated E045 (PLT3->Lateral_Root_Density).]

evidence.title: PLETHORA orchestrate patterning
evidence.evidence_sentence: periclinal cell divisions defects; only ~3% primordia emerged in plt3plt5plt7
evidence.claim: PLT3 required for emergence and correct LR density

edges.mechanism: PUCHI controls LR primordium morphogenesis and spacing

evidence.title: Auxin-Regulated LR Organogenesis
evidence.authors: Cavallari N, Artner C, Benkova E
evidence.evidence_sentence: loss of PUCHI results in abnormally enlarged flank cells and clustering of LRP

edges.mechanism: LAX3 required for LR emergence

evidence.title: Interplay of Auxin and Cytokinin in LR Development
evidence.evidence_sentence: Disrupting auxin-inducible LAX3 expression phenocopied mutant, resulting in delayed lateral root emergence

edges.mechanism: PIN2 mediates basipetal auxin reflux through epidermis [Edge represents composite family; evidence drawn from curated E066 (PIN2->Lateral_Root_Density).]

evidence.evidence_sentence: Auxin is refluxed back by basipetal transport through the epidermis in a PIN2- and AUX1-dependent manner

evidence.evidence_sentence: ANR1 MADS box gene plays key role; its underexpression prevents local stimulation of lateral root elongation by high nitrate availability

evidence.evidence_sentence: cytokinin biosynthesis enzyme IPT, degrading enzyme CKX, and signaling components AHK, ARR, and AHP6, are involved in LRs

evidence.evidence_sentence: AHK, ARR, and AHP6 are involved in LRs initiation and growth

edges.mechanism: NRT1.1 activates Ca2+ signaling that phosphorylates NLP7

evidence.evidence_sentence: ANR1, a transcription factor functioning downstream of NRT1.1

edges.mechanism: N deficiency (<100 uM NO3-) induces CLE3 transcription in pericycle [Edge represents composite family; evidence drawn from curated E217 (Low_Nitrate->CLE3).]

evidence.evidence_sentence: CLE1, -3, -4, and -7 were induced by N deficiency in roots, predominantly expressed in root pericycle cells

evidence.evidence_sentence: CLE peptides are hypothesized to be secreted from pericycle cells and transported through the apoplastic continuum to reach CLV1 in companion cells

evidence.evidence_sentence: clv1 mutants showed progressive outgrowth of lateral root primordia into lateral roots under N-deficient conditions
